name: @remudero/shell-macos
description: Tauri v2 macOS shell (shell 1, MASTER-PLAN §7 -> W3-T3): wraps the UNMODIFIED shell-0 web build (apps/dashboard) in a native shell -- menu-bar presence (tray icon + Show/Hide/Quit menu), launch-at-login, native notifications, a global hotkey, and deep links. scripts/sync-web-build.mjs copies apps/dashboard's index.html and its compiled main.js byte-for-byte into web-dist/ (git-ignored build output) -- the shell adds native affordances, it never forks the web code. Reads the same tailnet api-client surface as shell 0; no daemon code lives here. `npm run build` here drives a real `cargo`/`tauri build` -> a signed, launchable .app -- see README.md's "Verified" section for the reproducible end-to-end transcript (scripts/verify-daemon.mjs + src-tauri/src/lib.rs's REMUDERO_DAEMON_URL/REMUDERO_VERIFY_DUMP env-gated verification hooks).
